query: What is the blast radius of changing SPKEZ?
answer:
`SPKEZ` is called by `CRONOS`, `ET2LST`, `ILLUM`, `LS`, `SPKEZR`, `SUBPT`, `ZZGFCOST`, `ZZGFDIU`, `ZZGFPAU`, `ZZGFRRQ`, `ZZGFRRU`, and `ZZGFSPU` [file:3-1345].
`SPKEZ` computes the state (position and velocity) of a target body relative to an observing body, with optional aberration corrections [file:3-7]. It relies on SPK files loaded into the SPICE system [file:1219-1222]. It may signal errors related to unknown frames or insufficient kernel data [file:1186-1215].
